channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Anna Maria Island turtle watch volunteers work to protect sea turtle nests on Florida beaches
item.description: Sea turtle nesting season runs from May 1 through October 31, and on Anna Maria Island, volunteers are working every day to make sure every hatchling has the best chance of making it to the water.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Reconciliation 3.0: What the GOP's $95 billion legislative push means for you and your family
item.description: Congress votes on reconciliation 3.0, a $95B package covering the Iran War, farm aid, and election reform. Here's what it means for you.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Brazil threatens reciprocal tariffs after US targets imports
item.description: Brazil’s government blasted new U.S. tariffs as unfair and offensive, warning it could respond with reciprocal trade measures.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Tesla Robotaxi launches driverless ride service in Tampa
item.description: While driverless vehicles like Waymo have become a familiar sight across the country, Tesla is now entering the market locally with the official launch of its Robotaxi service in Tampa and Orlando.

item.title: [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Watch: Tampa police to the rescue after child accidentally locked in car
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] CDC reports over 4,100 cyclosporiasis cases. What about Florida?
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Sarasota parking fight isn't over after heated public backlash

[WATCHLIST: tropical storm] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] New Orleans included in tropical storm warning as Bertha approaches
item.description: Slow-moving Tropical Storm Bertha is expected to bring days of heavy rain and gusty winds to coastal Louisiana and parts of the Gulf Coast.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Susan Solves It: Travel scams
item.description: Tampa Bay 28 Reporter Susan El Khoury advises verifying travel websites before booking, avoiding rushing into limited-time offers, and comparing listings to help spot scams before you pay.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 22
item.description: New tariffs on Canadian goods could raise prices on everyday items. Plus, missing U.S. service member presumed dead after attacks in Jordan.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Mega Millions jackpot climbs to $743 million
item.description: USA Mega said two players matched the first five numbers for a second-prize win, with one winner from Arizona and one from California.

[The Florida Channel] 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended: Governor Signs Death Warrant for William Silvia as Two Other Death Row Inmates Await Execution
item.description: 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended: Governor Signs Death Warrant for William Silvia as Two Other Death Row Inmates Await Execution first appeared on The Florida Channel The state has already executed ten death row inmates this year and has plans to execute three more. Last year, the State of Florida set a modern-era record with nineteen executions. 7/21/26 Capitol Update Extended: Governor Signs Deat
